'''yarozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:docebenone|docebenone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-r-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:docebenone|docebenone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yarozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yærezeth|yærezeth]] || [[word:yærezej|yærezej]] || [[word:yærezesh|yærezesh]] || [[word:yæreze|yæreze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yarorozoth|yarorozoth]] || [[word:yarorozoj|yarorozoj]] || [[word:yarorozosh|yarorozosh]] || [[word:yarorozo|yarorozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yarozoth|yarozoth]] || [[word:yarozoj|yarozoj]] || [[word:yarozosh|yarozosh]] || [[word:yarozo|yarozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yarofzoth|yarofzoth]] || [[word:yarofzoj|yarofzoj]] || [[word:yarofzosh|yarofzosh]] || [[word:yarofzof|yarofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yarozotho|yarozotho]] || [[word:yarozojo|yarozojo]] || [[word:yarozosho|yarozosho]] || [[word:yarozoko|yarozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yarozoth|yarozoth]] || [[word:yarozoj|yarozoj]] || [[word:yarozosh|yarozosh]] || [[word:yarozo|yarozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yarozothol|yarozothol]] || [[word:yarozojol|yarozojol]] || [[word:yarozoshol|yarozoshol]] || [[word:yarozokol|yarozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yarozothotho|yarozothotho]] || [[word:yarozojojo|yarozojojo]] || [[word:yarozoshosho|yarozoshosho]] || [[word:yarozoko|yarozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yarozothon|yarozothon]] || [[word:yarozojon|yarozojon]] || [[word:yarozoshon|yarozoshon]] || [[word:yarozokon|yarozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yarozothoro|yarozothoro]] || [[word:yarozojoro|yarozojoro]] || [[word:yarozoshoro|yarozoshoro]] || [[word:yarozokoro|yarozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
